creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
> HP EliteBook 8540p notebook with UEFI enabled.

I no longer use that type of notebook (with NVIDIA), and I don't expect to find an opportunity to test with the same hardware anywhere in the near future. 

I do have tearing with UEFI (without CSM) with Radeon hardware in an EliteBook 8570p, but it's visually different from the 2016 photograph of the bug with NVIDIA.
